title: Crispy Crumbly Duck Leg
description: A classic Chinese-inspired dish featuring a crispy crumbly crust on the outside and tender duck leg on the inside.
instructions: Season the duck leg with five-spice powder and set aside.
In a shallow dish, mix together panko breadcrumbs and a pinch of salt.
Dip the duck leg into the breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck leg until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the duck leg to a baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the duck leg is baking, heat the bitter melon in a small saucepan over medium heat until slightly softened.
Once the duck leg is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving with the bitter melon.
